title: mentha longifolia f. veroniciformis
intro: Mentha longifolia f. veroniciformis, also known as Horehound, is a type of perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of volatile oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Horehound include relief from coughs and colds, reduced inflammation, and improved digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Horehound is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
